author: @mikeschulik8822
text: Big shoutout to Coach Erik — I took  a lesson in person. Between that and his video drills I have seriously sharpened my ball striking. I’ve been able to apply it pretty fast. I’ve made more progress in the last few months than I expected. It’s straight forward and delivers. Hitting the ball cleaner, more consistently, and starting to gain some serious confidence. It seems like I’m always looking at a chance for birdie when before it was for par or bogey or worse with the way I was chunking it.  If you’re stuck, like I was, this is your guy.

author: @ejsgolf
text: Thank you Mike.   Really appreciate the kind words and I love how your progress has happened.  Keep up the great work!
